OE 12: Update NorthWind CRM deal stage using crm_update_deal_stage (id: "deal_northwind_denver_expansion" or "deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2", dealstage: value reflecting at-risk status — e.g. "decisionMakerBoughtIn" or whichever valid stage on the default pipeline best captures the account being in jeopardy; note that "at_risk" is not a valid stage on the default pipeline). Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 13: Create NorthWind CRM engagement note using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", company_ids: ["company_northwind"], body: Catalina commitments inventory, service failures on Raj Patel and Emilia Cruz, PathFinder competitor threat, Alejandro retention scenarios, financial exposure). Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 14: Create StormCloud CRM engagement note using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", company_ids: ["company_stormcloud"], body: Liam escalation, Mina recovery plan with 2 items still unresolved — $500 credit misapplied to EST-2026-0287 needs correction to INV-2026-0319, and Simone Richter stipend frozen under blanket hold — plus Jae-won Kim housing issue where lease was never finalized despite records showing completed, Mina recovery plan status). Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 15: Create Vectral CRM engagement note using crm_create_engagement (engagement_type: "NOTE", company_ids: ["company_vectral"], body: post-board silence assessment since April 23, recommendation for Mina follow-up with Rachel Whitfield). Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 16: Look up contact details for Mina Hashimoto using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Mina Hashimoto"). Finds: mina.hashimoto@moveops.com. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC.
OE 17: Look up contact details for Marcus Thorne using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Marcus Thorne"). Finds: marcus.thorne@moveops.com. Read/lookup. Default tool. Skip TS. Skip QC.
OE 18: Send message to Mina about StormCloud credit status using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C002", payload: credit status update) or send_email (sender: "david.chen@moveops.com", recipients: ["mina.hashimoto@moveops.com"], content: credit status update). Content: Marcus confirmed credit was misapplied to EST-2026-0287 and needs correction to INV-2026-0319, direction on Simone stipend status. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 19: Post team summary in #customer-engagement using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C002", payload: summary). Content: status of all three at-risk accounts, action items, Elena retention scenario decision needed for NorthWind. Write action. Goes to Outcome.
OE 20: Message Marcus in #finance about StormCloud credit reapplication using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C005", payload: message). Content: confirm credit should be reapplied from EST-2026-0287 to INV-2026-0319, ask about Simone stipend release status. Write action. Goes to Outcome.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

2 The NorthWind CRM engagement note body mentions Catalina's April 14 recovery plan promise to Pam that was never delivered (or similar acknowledgment that the commitment went unfulfilled).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The NorthWind engagement note body explicitly states 'Commitments made to Pam on April 14: 1. Promised a comprehensive service recovery plan within one week...' and 'What was actually delivered: - NOTHING. The recovery plan was never finished or sent.' This clearly documents the April 14 promise and the non-delivery.
✓Run #2The NorthWind engagement note body explicitly states: 'April 14 — Promised Pam a comprehensive service recovery plan within the week... NEVER SENT.' This directly documents the April 14 commitment to Pam that was never delivered.
✓Run #3The NorthWind CRM note body explicitly states: 'Catalina promised Pam a service recovery plan on April 14. As of April 26, that plan was NEVER delivered.' This directly addresses the undelivered April 14 recovery plan promise.
✓Run #4The NorthWind engagement note body explicitly states: 'COMMITMENT (April 14): Emailed Pam promising a comprehensive service recovery plan within one week... STATUS: NEVER DELIVERED. Catalina started drafting the plan but never finished or sent it.' This directly documents the April 14 promise that went unfulfilled.
✓Run #5The NorthWind engagement note explicitly states: 'On April 14, Catalina promised Pam Kowalski a recovery plan within the week...As of April 26, that recovery plan was NEVER delivered.'
✓Run #6The NorthWind engagement note body explicitly states 'April 14 — Catalina emailed Pam promising a comprehensive service recovery plan within the week... What was actually delivered: Nothing. The recovery plan was never sent.'
3 The NorthWind CRM engagement note body mentions the Raj Patel chain-of-custody breach (or similar reference to the server lab security incident).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The NorthWind engagement note body includes a section titled 'RAJ PATEL — Chain-of-Custody Breach (Server Lab Relocation, Chicago → Denver)' with detailed description of the breach including loading before escort arrived and unauthorized warehouse storage.
✓Run #2The NorthWind engagement note body includes a detailed entry on 'Raj Patel (Principal Architect) — Chain-of-custody breach during server lab relocation' describing the full incident.
✓Run #3The NorthWind CRM note body includes 'RAJ PATEL (Principal Architect) -- SECURITY BREACH' with details: 'Equipment was loaded BEFORE the required IT security escort arrived' and 'Chain-of-custody requirements breached: no IT escort supervision during loading, unauthorized warehouse stop'.
✓Run #4The NorthWind engagement note body contains a full 'SERVICE FAILURES — RAJ PATEL' section documenting the chain-of-custody breach on April 10, including SentinelChain loading without security escort and unauthorized warehouse storage.
✓Run #5The NorthWind engagement note contains a full 'SERVICE FAILURE #1 — Raj Patel Chain-of-Custody Breach' section with detailed timeline.
✓Run #6The NorthWind engagement note explicitly documents 'Raj Patel (Principal Architect) — Chain-of-custody breach' with full details about the security incident.
4 The NorthWind CRM engagement note body mentions the Emilia Cruz piano damage (or similar reference to the Steinway incident during her relocation).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The NorthWind engagement note explicitly mentions 'EMILIA CRUZ — Piano Damage and Communication Failure: Steinway Model B grand piano (7ft, 480 lbs) was damaged during extraction.'
✓Run #2The NorthWind engagement note body explicitly states: 'Emilia Cruz (Director of Marketing) — Steinway Model B grand piano scratched during extraction by Gentle Giant Piano Movers.'
✓Run #3The NorthWind CRM note body includes 'EMILIA CRUZ (Director of Marketing) -- PIANO DAMAGE + COMMUNICATION FAILURE' with: 'Steinway Model B grand piano was damaged during extraction (scratch)'.
✓Run #4The NorthWind engagement note body explicitly documents 'Steinway Model B grand piano (7ft, 480 lbs, insured at $90,000) damaged during extraction — visible scratch' under the Emilia Cruz service failures section.
✓Run #5The NorthWind engagement note includes 'SERVICE FAILURE #2 — Emilia Cruz Piano Damage & Callback Gap' with reference to the 'Steinway Model B grand piano was scratched.'
✓Run #6The NorthWind engagement note body explicitly mentions 'Steinway Model B grand piano (7ft, 480 lbs, insured at ~$90,000) was scratched during extraction' under the Emilia Cruz section.
5 The NorthWind CRM engagement note body mentions the unanswered callback on Emilia Cruz's request (or similar reference to the 13-day callback gap).
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
